title: Create with Code
creator: Unity Technologies
description: A project-based beginner course introducing Unity and C# through several small prototypes and practical programming challenges.
useful: Provides a defined sequence for learning editor basics and scripting instead of assembling unrelated tutorials.
audience: Beginning Unity users who want a guided route through the editor and C# scripting.
learning: Navigate Unity's project and scene workflow
Write C# behavior for several small prototypes
